word: G4191 - πονηρότερος - ponēróteros - pon-ay-rot'-er-os - More wicked

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πονηρότερος

- Transliteration: Poneroteros

- Phonetic: pon-ay-rot'-er-os

- Definition:

1. more evil

- Origin: comparative of G4190

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Comparative of G4190; more evil: - more wicked.
